feature_name: make_timestamptz(bigint, bigint, bigint, bigint, bigint, double, string)
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, make_timestamptz(2023, 10, 1, 12, 30, 0, 'UTC'));
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (2, make_timestamptz(2022, 5, 20, 8, 15, 45.987654, 'America/New_York'));
SELECT id, event_time AT TIME ZONE 'PST' FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = make_timestamptz(2024, 1, 15, 9, 0, 0, 'CET') WHERE id = 2;
